steps.title: Spot the specific service in the notes
steps.content: The notes mention one specific public service: water treatment.

steps.title: Find the choice that names this example
steps.content: Choice C fulfills the goal by naming water treatment as a specific service Ixmiquilpan provides. Choices A and B describe public services in general without naming a specific one, and D shifts to population data. That matches choice C — C is correct.
